overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a medieval gothic potions classroom with vaulted stone ceilings and arches. Students in dark robes move through the dimly lit room, illuminated by hanging lanterns, approaching wooden worktables laden with cauldrons and magical equipment. The camera maintains a fixed elevated perspective as characters enter, interact with the environment, and exit the frame.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit gothic potions classroom with vaulted stone ceilings. A student enters from the foreground and walks toward the central worktable, passing under hanging lanterns. The room features stone walls with arched windows and wooden tables laden with magical equipment.

segments.scene_description: The student who entered previously turns and exits the frame toward the bottom right, while another student enters from the right side doorway. The camera remains fixed on the classroom interior, showing the vaulted ceiling and worktables as the characters move through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a fixed perspective within a dimly lit gothic potions classroom as a succession of students move through the atmospheric space. It begins with a student walking from the foreground toward a central worktable beneath vaulted stone ceilings and hanging lanterns. As this student exits toward the bottom right, another enters from a side doorway, shifting the focus across the room's arched windows and equipment-laden tables. The scene then settles into a momentary quiet as the foreground clears, leaving only the static stone architecture and subtle movements of distant figures near the far wall. Finally, a new student enters from the right and approaches the foreground table to examine the magical equipment, concluding the sequence amidst the warm lantern light.
